---
title: "Alt+Tab fix + HintPillOpacity config — plan/report"
author: "Yun Jiang"
date: "2026-07-22"
format:
  html:
    html-math-method: mathjax
include-in-header:
  text: |
    <link rel="icon" href="data:image/svg+xml,<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 100 100'><text y='.9em' font-size='90'>🏷️</text></svg>">
---

# Two changes in one drop

## 1. Fix: Alt+Tab no longer switched windows (regression)

**Symptom:** with the overlay up, `Alt+Tab` did not switch windows; the next keystrokes
(e.g. "tag") were captured by the overlay.

**Root cause** (`src/HuntAndPeck/Services/OverlayKeyboardHook.cs`): `Tab` is *always*
classified as `CycleMonitorNext` in `Classify` — that branch runs **before** the
Ctrl/Alt/Win gate, so Tab is swallowed (`return 1`) unless the early held-modifier
passthrough fires. That passthrough checked only `_altHeld`, which was set on
`vk == VK_MENU (0x12)`. But the `WH_KEYBOARD_LL` hook delivers Alt as
`VK_LMENU (0xA4)` / `VK_RMENU (0xA5)` (you can distinguish left/right Alt *because* the
raw hook gives the specific codes), so `_altHeld` never became true → Tab was eaten →
Alt+Tab never reached the OS.

**Fix** (robust either way):

- Track Alt on `VK_MENU || VK_LMENU || VK_RMENU` (added the two codes to `User32`).
- Backstop the passthrough with `IsDown(VK_MENU)` (`GetAsyncKeyState` reads the generic
  Alt state reliably — unlike Capslock, which AHK can neutralize, so Capslock stays
  event-only).

## 2. Feat: configurable pill opacity (`HintPillOpacity`)

The base pill's α=0.8 was hardcoded. Make it a hot-reload config key (percent 0-100,
default 80): `App.config` → `OverlayActionConfig.ReadHintPillOpacity` /
`ParsePercent` → `OverlayViewModel.PillOpacity` (read once per overlay) → bound to a new
`HintCanvas.PillOpacity` DP that rebuilds the semi-transparent brushes + re-renders.
Exposed in the Options dialog. The label **text** stays fully opaque regardless (crisp).

# Files

`NativeMethods/User32.cs` (VK_LMENU/VK_RMENU),
`Services/OverlayKeyboardHook.cs` (Alt tracking + passthrough backstop),
`Services/OverlayActionConfig.cs` (`ParsePercent`, `ReadHintPillOpacity`),
`ViewModels/OverlayViewModel.cs` (`_pillOpacity`/`PillOpacity`),
`Views/HintCanvas.cs` (`PillOpacity` DP, instance brushes, `BuildBrushes`),
`Views/OverlayView.xaml` (`PillOpacity` binding),
`ViewModels/OptionsViewModel.cs` + `Views/OptionsView.xaml` (dialog row),
`App.config` (`HintPillOpacity=80`),
`HuntAndPeck.Tests/Services/OverlayActionConfigTest.cs` (`ParsePercent` theory),
`CLAUDE.md`, `CHANGELOG.md`.

# Verification

CI compile + xUnit green (incl. new `ParsePercent` theory). Runtime (Windows): Alt+Tab
switches windows while the overlay is up; pill opacity follows `HintPillOpacity`
(hot-reload on next trigger), text stays crisp.
